rulings.Case Title: 11TH & KISSLING STREET TRUST VS. AIRBNB, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 20, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend. Demurrer has been previously sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts to address specific issues as to each cause of action. Plaintiff failed to do so. Plaintiff's oversized opposition fails to suggest any possibility of further amendment. Pages 16-19 of Plaintiff's opposition are stricken. = (501/REQ)
